text.message: Ashton, I’ve been disappointed in your performance this year
Well when Blue takes weird spots like that, it leaves rest of board open
It’s the only wheat we left him… u could of taken the
lol you’re right should have played with no wheat
Which is worse because he can't even use this wood port
just gotta delay the sheep port as much as we can i guess
Just don’t think it’s only me… I’m not that strong
well i guess i will just steal it then
i am not even interested in 3 11 lol
looks more like you trying to screw me when we are both screwed already
you are forcing both of us wasting card at this point
You want me to just give you a city?
and i wasted a road to defend a spot instead of saving for settle
no, i meant you just wasted a road and force me to waste a road as well
instead of both trying to save for settle
yea maybe you should have just asked
i had 2 cards when you drop that road, idk in what world you think i was trying to plow you
it looked more like you trying to plow me
Just bizarre that yall all stopped worrying about green after it was clear he had best setup
I took road just so green didn’t win
idk how we left 8310 for green
lol yet you started robbing me exclusively?
build some road if you still want to stay in the game blue
Yall played this terribly and act like you knew what was gonna happen 😂
How can I build roads when you keep blocking road spots instead of solo’ing green?
How bout you should have blocked him the whole time instead of me?
He has a sheep port man
Block the 8 sheep. It’s not hard
anyone wanna help me fight army?
I’ve got 2 more down knights u can’t win it don’t give blue cards
lets see if blue will extend road then lol
You keep blocking brick you buffoon
Pretty sure blue wins this game… has open settle
pretty sure you win with 2 roads
Keep blocking the 10 brick it really hurts green
